milestone: Experience Home was a one-way dead end, blocking Place editing
slice: Found live authoring: five actions in the Scene editor (creating a Decoration/Text/Frame Experience via the quick-pickers, "Open in Experience Home ->", the sidebar's "New Experience ->") switch currentNav to 'experiences', taking over the whole Context Inspector column. The only thing that ever reset currentNav back to 'scenes' was the old global nav bar's own "Scenes" button -- but that bar is now permanently hidden (Scenes+Experiences both became always-visible columns in the Continuous Builder rebuild), so any of those five actions silently stranded the author: Context Inspector stuck on Experience Home's Gallery/Nursery browsing screen, Place/Decorations/Text never reachable again -- exactly the reported "overlay of place-decoration-text keeps hiding... not able to enter places properties." Fixed with the same "<- Back to Scene" pattern the Frames screen already established for this exact class of problem -- shown at the top of Experience Home whenever a Scene is open, resetting currentNav to 'scenes' and returning to exactly where the author left off. Verified via Playwright: creating a Decoration Experience via the glyph picker reproduces the dead end; the new button correctly escapes it; a Place activity click afterward renders the real Place properties panel. goldenBuild.js 30/30 unchanged.
